retrieved_result: Why Does Rain Smell So Good? "Rain is an element of nature that many in society revere: We love it for the pitter patter it makes when it hits our roof; it gives us an excuse to curl up on the couch with a good book; and has inspired artistic masterpieces. Rain has the innate ability to simultaneously engage all of our senses,
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses rain smell and sensory experiences, not TikTok trends or anything related to the query about top TikTok trends for 2024.
